title: pittosporum lancifolium
intro: Pittosporum lancifolium, also known as Chinese cheesewood or lance-leaf pittosporum, is a small evergreen tree or shrub native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pittosporum lancifolium include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
